301.iwh_en: It was narrated from some Companions of the Prophet ﷺ that the Prophet ﷺ was seen at al-Arj pouring water over his head while he was fasting, either from the heat or from thirst.
301.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari sebagian sahabat Nabi ﷺ bahwa Nabi ﷺ terlihat di al-Arj menuangkan air ke atas kepalanya sementara beliau sedang berpuasa, baik karena panas atau karena haus.

302.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman of theirs that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered upon me while I was eating with my left hand — and I was a left-handed woman. He struck my hand and the morsel fell. He said: Do not eat with your left hand, for Allah has made for you a right hand' — or he said: 'for Allah has freed your right hand.' She said: 'So it changed.'
302.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita dari mereka bahwa dia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ masuk menemuiku sementara aku sedang makan dengan tangan kiriku — dan aku adalah wanita kidal. Beliau memukul tanganku dan suapan jatuh. Beliau bersabda: Janganlah makan dengan tangan kirimu, karena Allah telah menjadikan untukmu tangan kanan' — atau beliau berkata: 'karena Allah telah membebaskan tangan kananmu.' Dia berkata: 'Maka berubahlah.'

303.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man from Khuza'ah known as Mihrash or Mukharrish, about whom Sufyan ibn Uyaynah was not certain of his name, that the Prophet ﷺ went out from al-Ji'ranah at night, performed Umrah, then returned and spent the morning there as if he had spent the night. He looked...
303.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki dari Khuza'ah yang dikenal sebagai Mihrash atau Mukharrisy, yang Sufyan ibn Uyainah tidak pasti tentang namanya, bahwa Nabi ﷺ keluar dari al-Ji'ranah pada malam hari, melakukan Umrah, kemudian kembali dan menghabiskan pagi hari di sana seolah-olah beliau menghabiskan malam. Beliau melihat...

304.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man from Thaqif from his father that the Prophet ﷺ urinated and then sprinkled water over his private part.
304.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki dari Tsaqif dari ayahnya bahwa Nabi ﷺ buang air kecil kemudian memercikkan air ke bagian pribadinya.

305.iwh_en: It was narrated from the uncles of Abu Jubayr ibn al-Dahhak al-Ansari that the Prophet ﷺ came to them and every one of them had one or two nicknames. When he called a man by his nickname and they said: 'O Messenger of Allah, he dislikes that,' the verse was revealed: 'And do not call each other by offensive nicknames.'
305.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari paman-paman Abu Jubair ibn al-Dahhak al-Anshari bahwa Nabi ﷺ datang kepada mereka dan setiap orang dari mereka memiliki satu atau dua julukan. Ketika beliau memanggil seorang laki-laki dengan julukannya dan mereka berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, dia tidak menyukai itu,' turunlah ayat: 'Dan janganlah kalian saling memanggil dengan julukan yang buruk.'

306.iwh_en: It was narrated from the uncle of Mu'adh ibn Abdullah ibn Khubayb that he said: 'We were in a gathering when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ appeared with traces of water on his head. We said: O Messenger of Allah, we see you in good spirits.' He said: 'Indeed.' Then the people began discussing wealth, and the Prophet ﷺ said: 'There is no harm in...'
306.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari paman Mu'adz ibn Abdullah ibn Khubayb bahwa dia berkata: 'Kami berada dalam sebuah majelis ketika Rasulullah ﷺ muncul dengan bekas air di kepalanya. Kami berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, kami melihatmu dalam keadaan bahagia.' Beliau bersabda: 'Benar.' Kemudian orang-orang mulai membicarakan kekayaan, dan Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada salahnya dalam...'

307.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man from Banu Saleet that he passed by the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was sitting at the door of his mosque in a cross-legged position, wearing only a cotton garment, saying: 'A Muslim is the brother of a Muslim — he neither wrongs him nor abandons him.' Then he pointed with his hand to his chest saying: 'Piety is here, piety is here.'
307.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki dari Banu Saleet bahwa dia melewati Rasulullah ﷺ yang sedang duduk di pintu masjidnya dalam posisi bersila, hanya mengenakan pakaian kapas, bersabda: 'Seorang Muslim adalah saudara Muslim — dia tidak mendzalimi dan tidak meninggalkannya.' Kemudian beliau menunjuk dengan tangannya ke dadanya sambil bersabda: 'Takwa ada di sini, takwa ada di sini.'

308.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man from the Ansar from the Prophet ﷺ that he said: 'Horses are of three types: A horse tied up for the sake of Allah — its price is a reward, riding it is a reward, lending it is a reward, and its fodder is a reward. A horse on which a man places a wager and gambles — its price is a burden, its fodder is a burden, and riding it is a burden. And a horse...'
308.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki dari Anshar dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Kuda ada tiga jenis: Kuda yang diikat di jalan Allah — harganya adalah pahala, menungganginya adalah pahala, meminjamkannya adalah pahala, dan pakan ternak untuk kuda itu adalah pahala. Kuda yang dipertaruhkan oleh seseorang dalam perjudian — harganya adalah dosa, pakan ternaknya adalah dosa, dan menungganginya adalah dosa. Dan kuda...'

309.iwh_en: It was narrated from the grandmother of Yahya ibn Husayn ibn Urwa that she said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: If a slave is appointed over you to lead you according to the Book of Allah, then listen to him and obey.'
309.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari nenek Yahya ibn Husain ibn Urwah bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Jika seorang budak diangkat atas kalian untuk memimpin kalian menurut Kitabullah, maka dengarkanlah dia dan taatilah.'

310.iwh_en: It was narrated from the grandmother of Yahya ibn Husayn that she said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying: May Allah have mercy on those who shave — may Allah have mercy on those who shave — may Allah have mercy on those who shave.' On the third time they said: 'And those who shorten?' He said: 'And those who shorten.'
310.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari nenek Yahya ibn Husain bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Semoga Allah merahmati mereka yang mencukur — semoga Allah merahmati mereka yang mencukur — semoga Allah merahmati mereka yang mencukur.' Pada kali ketiga mereka berkata: 'Dan mereka yang memendekkan?' Beliau bersabda: 'Dan mereka yang memendekkan.'

311.iwh_en: It was narrated from the grandmother of Ibn Bijad that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Turn away the beggar, even if with a burnt sheep's hoof.'
311.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari nenek Ibnu Bijad bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tolaklah pengemis itu, meskipun hanya dengan kuku domba yang dibakar.'

312.iwh_en: It was narrated from the mother of Yahya ibn al-Husayn that she heard the Prophet ﷺ giving a sermon during the Farewell Pilgrimage saying: 'O people, fear Allah, listen and obey — even if a mutilated Abyssinian slave is appointed over you, as long as he upholds the Book of Allah Almighty among you.'
312.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ibu Yahya ibn al-Husain bahwa dia mendengar Nabi ﷺ berkhutbah pada Haji Wada' bersabda: 'Wahai manusia, bertakwalah kepada Allah, dengarkan dan taatilah — meskipun seorang budak Habasyah yang cacat diangkat atas kalian, selama dia menegakkan Kitabullah azza wa jalla di antara kalian.'

313.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman of their tribe who had prayed toward both qiblahs with the Prophet ﷺ that she entered upon the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he said to her: 'Apply henna. Do any of you leave off henna until her hand becomes like a man's hand?' She said: 'She never abandoned henna until she met Allah Almighty.'
313.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita dari suku mereka yang pernah shalat menghadap kedua kiblat bersama Nabi ﷺ bahwa dia masuk menemui Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau berkata kepadanya: 'Pakailah henna. Apakah salah seorang dari kalian meninggalkan henna hingga tangannya menjadi seperti tangan laki-laki?' Dia berkata: 'Dia tidak pernah meninggalkan henna hingga bertemu Allah azza wa jalla.'

314.iwh_en: It was narrated from the grandfather of Rabah ibn Abd al-Rahman ibn Huwaytib, who heard his grandfather say: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: There is no prayer for one who has no ablution, and no ablution for one who does not mention the name of Allah over it. One does not believe in Allah who does not believe in me, and one does not believe in me who...'
314.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari kakek Rabah ibn Abd al-Rahman ibn Huwaytib, yang mendengar kakeknya berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Tidak ada shalat bagi yang tidak berwudhu, dan tidak ada wudhu bagi yang tidak menyebut nama Allah di atasnya. Tidak beriman kepada Allah orang yang tidak beriman kepadaku, dan tidak beriman kepadaku orang yang...'

315.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rib'iyyah bint Iyadh al-Kilabiyyah that she heard Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) say: 'Eat pomegranate with its white pulp, for it is a tanner of the stomach.'
315.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rib'iyyah bint Iyadz al-Kilabiyyah bahwa dia mendengar Ali (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Makanlah delima dengan daging putihnya, karena itu adalah penyamak perut.'

316.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ashras that Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) was asked about the tides. He said: 'An angel is assigned to the depths of the sea. When he puts his foot in it, it overflows. When he lifts it, it recedes.'
316.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asyras bahwa Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) ditanya tentang pasang surut laut. Dia berkata: 'Seorang malaikat ditugaskan di kedalaman laut. Ketika dia meletakkan kakinya di dalamnya, air meluap. Ketika dia mengangkatnya, air surut.'

317.iwh_en: It was narrated from Musa ibn Abi Aisha that Maryam lost track of Isa (peace be upon him) and went searching for him. She met a weaver who did not guide her, so she cursed him, and he is always seen wandering. Then she met a tailor who guided her and she prayed for him, and tailors are beloved — that is, people like to sit with them.
317.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Musa ibn Abi Aisyah bahwa Maryam kehilangan jejak Isa (alayhissalam) dan pergi mencarinya. Dia bertemu seorang penenun yang tidak membimbingnya, maka dia mendoakan kecelakaan atasnya, dan dia selalu terlihat tersesat. Kemudian dia bertemu seorang penjahit yang membimbingnya dan dia mendoakan kebaikan atasnya, dan para penjahit itu disenangi — artinya, orang-orang suka duduk bersama mereka.

318.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I prayed with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he used to say in his bowing: Glory be to my Lord, the Mighty; and in his prostration: Glory be to my Lord, the Most High. He did not pass a verse of mercy without stopping at it and asking, nor a verse of punishment without seeking refuge from it.'
318.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku shalat bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau biasa mengucapkan dalam rukuknya: Subhana Rabbiya al-Adzim; dan dalam sujudnya: Subhana Rabbiya al-A'la. Beliau tidak melewati satu ayat rahmat pun tanpa berhenti di situ dan memohon, dan tidak melewati ayat azab pun tanpa berlindung darinya.'

319.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ come to a rubbish heap belonging to some people and urinate while standing. Then he called for water, and I brought it to him, and he performed ablution and wiped over his leather socks.'
319.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ mendatangi tumpukan sampah milik suatu kaum dan buang air kecil sambil berdiri. Kemudian beliau meminta air, dan aku membawanya kepadanya, dan beliau berwudhu dan mengusap di atas kedua sepatunya.'

320.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to, when he rose in the night, clean his mouth with the siwak.
320.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa, ketika bangun di malam hari, membersihkan mulutnya dengan siwak.

321.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ took hold of the calf of Hudhayfa's leg or his own leg and said: 'This is where the garment goes. If you refuse, then lower. If you still refuse, then the garment has no right to go below the ankles.'
321.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memegang betis Hudzaifah atau betisnya sendiri dan bersabda: 'Di sinilah tempat sarung berakhir. Jika engkau tidak mau, turunkan lebih. Jika tetap tidak mau, maka sarung tidak berhak melewati bawah mata kaki.'

322.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ, when he went to his bed, would place his right hand under his cheek and say: 'My Lord, guard me from Your punishment on the Day You resurrect — or gather — Your servants.'
322.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ, ketika pergi ke tempat tidurnya, meletakkan tangan kanannya di bawah pipinya dan berdoa: 'Ya Tuhanku, lindungi aku dari azab-Mu pada hari Engkau membangkitkan — atau mengumpulkan — hamba-hamba-Mu.'

323.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Follow the two who come after me: Abu Bakr and Umar.'
323.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Ikutilah dua orang yang datang setelahku: Abu Bakar dan Umar.'

324.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ came to a rubbish heap belonging to some people and urinated while standing. He went to move away from him but the Prophet ﷺ drew him close...
324.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mendatangi tumpukan sampah milik suatu kaum dan buang air kecil sambil berdiri. Hudzaifah pergi untuk menjauh darinya tetapi Nabi ﷺ mendekatkannya...

325.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'A tale-bearer will not enter Paradise.'
325.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seorang tukang adu domba tidak akan masuk surga.'

326.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that it reached him that Abu Musa used to urinate in a bottle, saying the Children of Israel used to cut out the spot where urine fell on them. Hudhayfa said: 'I wish your companion would not be so strict about this. I witnessed myself walking with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and we came to a rubbish heap. He stood urinating as one of you would urinate. I went to move away from him and he said: Come close.'
326.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa sampai kepadanya bahwa Abu Musa biasa buang air kecil dalam botol, berkata bahwa Bani Israil biasa memotong bagian tempat air kencing jatuh mengenai mereka. Hudzaifah berkata: 'Sekiranya temanmu tidak seketat ini. Aku menyaksikan diriku berjalan bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dan kami mendatangi tumpukan sampah. Beliau berdiri buang air kecil sebagaimana salah seorang dari kalian buang air kecil. Aku pergi untuk menjauh darinya dan beliau bersabda: Mendekatlah.'

327.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'When we were at a meal with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, we would not extend our hands until the Messenger of Allah ﷺ started and extended his hand. We were once at a meal with him when a young girl came rushing in, as if being pushed, and she reached out...'
327.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Ketika kami berada di meja makan bersama Rasulullah ﷺ, kami tidak mengulurkan tangan kami hingga Rasulullah ﷺ memulai dan mengulurkan tangannya. Kami pernah berada di meja makan bersamanya ketika seorang gadis muda datang bergegas, seolah-olah didorong, dan dia mengulurkan tangannya...'

328.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The Dajjal is blind in his left eye, with thick bushy hair. With him is a garden and a fire. His fire is a garden and his garden is a fire.'
328.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Dajjal buta mata kirinya, dengan rambut lebat dan keriting. Bersamanya ada surga dan neraka. Nerakanya adalah surga dan surganya adalah neraka.'

329.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'This nation has been given preference over other nations in three things: the earth has been made pure and a mosque for them, their rows are arranged like the rows of angels, and they were given these verses from the end of Surah al-Baqarah from a treasure beneath the Throne that no prophet before me was given.'
329.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Umat ini telah diberi keutamaan atas umat-umat lain dalam tiga hal: bumi dijadikan suci dan masjid bagi mereka, barisan mereka diatur seperti barisan para malaikat, dan mereka diberikan ayat-ayat ini dari akhir Surah al-Baqarah dari perbendaharaan di bawah Arsy yang tidak diberikan kepada nabi sebelumku.'

330.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Every act of good is charity.'
330.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Setiap perbuatan baik adalah sedekah.'

331.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Mas'ud al-Ansari and Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with them) that they said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: There was a man from those who came before you who used to commit sins. When death came to him, he said to his family: When I die, burn me, then grind me, then scatter me in the sea on a windy day. When he died they did so. Allah Almighty gathered him and asked him: What made you do that? He said: Fear of You.'
331.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Mas'ud al-Anshari dan Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa mereka berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Ada seorang laki-laki dari orang-orang sebelummu yang biasa berbuat dosa. Ketika kematian datang kepadanya, dia berkata kepada keluarganya: Ketika aku mati, bakarlah aku, kemudian gilinglah aku, kemudian sebarkan aku di laut pada hari berangin. Ketika dia mati mereka melakukannya. Allah azza wa jalla mengumpulkannya dan bertanya: Apa yang membuatmu melakukan itu? Dia berkata: Rasa takutku kepada-Mu.'

332.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Among what people have retained from the words of the early prophethood is: If you have no shame, then do as you wish.'
332.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Di antara yang tersisa dari ucapan kenabian awal yang masih dipelihara manusia adalah: Jika kamu tidak memiliki rasa malu, maka lakukanlah apa yang kamu mau.'

333.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ narrated to us two things. I have seen one of them and I am waiting for the other. He told us that trust descended into the roots of men's hearts, then the Quran came down, so they learned from the Quran and from the Sunnah. Then he told us about the lifting of trust: A man will sleep and trust will be taken from his heart, so he will remain...'
333.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ menceritakan kepada kami dua hal. Aku telah melihat satu darinya dan aku menunggu yang lainnya. Beliau memberitahu kami bahwa amanah turun ke akar hati manusia, kemudian Al-Quran turun, maka mereka belajar dari Al-Quran dan dari Sunnah. Kemudian beliau memberitahu kami tentang terangkatnya amanah: Seorang laki-laki akan tidur dan amanah akan diambil dari hatinya, sehingga dia akan tinggal...'

334.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Wahb that Hudhayfa (may Allah be pleased with him) entered the mosque and saw a man praying near the doors of Kindah who was not completing his bowing or prostration. When he finished, Hudhayfa said to him: 'How long have you been praying like this?' He said: 'For forty years.' Hudhayfa said: 'You have not prayed for forty years, and if you die with this prayer, you will die contrary to the natural disposition upon which Muhammad ﷺ was created.'
334.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Wahb bahwa Hudzaifah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) masuk masjid dan melihat seorang laki-laki shalat di dekat pintu-pintu Kindah yang tidak menyempurnakan rukuknya maupun sujudnya. Ketika selesai, Hudzaifah berkata kepadanya: 'Sudah berapa lama kamu shalat seperti ini?' Dia berkata: 'Selama empat puluh tahun.' Hudzaifah berkata: 'Kamu tidak shalat selama empat puluh tahun, dan jika kamu mati dengan shalat seperti ini, kamu akan mati bertentangan dengan fitrah yang di atasnya Muhammad ﷺ diciptakan.'

335.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Count for me how many profess Islam.' We said: 'O Messenger of Allah, do you fear for us while we number between six hundred and seven hundred?' He said: 'You do not know — perhaps you will be put to trial.' Hudhayfa said: 'We were indeed put to trial until a man among us would only pray in secret.'
335.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hitunglah untuk aku berapa banyak yang mengaku Islam.' Kami berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, apakah engkau khawatir atas kami padahal kami berjumlah antara enam ratus hingga tujuh ratus?' Beliau bersabda: 'Kalian tidak tahu — mungkin kalian akan diuji.' Hudzaifah berkata: 'Kami memang diuji hingga salah seorang dari kami hanya shalat secara rahasia.'

336.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said: 'There will be rulers who lie and oppress. Whoever believes their lies and helps them in their oppression is not from us and I am not from them, and he will not come to me at the Fountain. But whoever does not believe their lies and does not help them in their oppression, he is from me and I am from him, and he will come to me at the Fountain.'
336.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Akan ada pemimpin-pemimpin yang berdusta dan berbuat zalim. Barangsiapa membenarkan kebohongan mereka dan membantu mereka dalam kezaliman mereka, dia bukan dari kami dan aku bukan dari mereka, dan dia tidak akan datang kepadaku di Telaga. Tetapi barangsiapa tidak membenarkan kebohongan mereka dan tidak membantu mereka dalam kezaliman mereka, maka dia dari kami dan aku dari mereka, dan dia akan datang kepadaku di Telaga.'

337.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I prayed with the Prophet ﷺ one night. He started with Surah al-Baqarah and read until he reached verse one hundred. I thought he would bow, but he continued until he reached two hundred. I thought he would bow, but he continued until he finished it. Then he started Surah Al Imran and finished it...'
337.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku shalat bersama Nabi ﷺ suatu malam. Beliau memulai dengan Surah al-Baqarah dan membaca hingga mencapai ayat seratus. Aku pikir beliau akan rukuk, tetapi beliau terus hingga mencapai dua ratus. Aku pikir beliau akan rukuk, tetapi beliau terus hingga menyelesaikannya. Kemudian beliau memulai Surah Ali Imran dan menyelesaikannya...'

338.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shutayr ibn Shakal, Silah ibn Zufar, and Sulayk ibn Mishal al-Ghifari that Hudhayfa (may Allah be pleased with him) came out to them while they were talking and said: 'You are speaking words that in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ we would have counted as hypocrisy.'
338.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shutair ibn Shakal, Silah ibn Zufar, dan Sulaik ibn Mischal al-Ghifari bahwa Hudzaifah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) keluar menemui mereka saat mereka sedang berbicara dan berkata: 'Kalian sedang berbicara kata-kata yang di zaman Rasulullah ﷺ kami akan menghitungnya sebagai kemunafikan.'

339.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that regarding one who sits in the middle of a circle, he said: 'He is cursed on the tongue of the Prophet ﷺ — or on the tongue of Muhammad ﷺ.'
339.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa mengenai orang yang duduk di tengah lingkaran, beliau berkata: 'Dia dilaknat dengan lisan Nabi ﷺ — atau dengan lisan Muhammad ﷺ.'

340.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ met him on one of the paths of Madinah and reached out to him. Hudhayfa said: 'I am in a state of ritual impurity.' He said: 'A believer does not become impure.'
340.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ menemuinya di salah satu jalan Madinah dan mengulurkan tangannya kepadanya. Hudzaifah berkata: 'Aku sedang dalam keadaan junub.' Beliau bersabda: 'Seorang mukmin tidak menjadi najis.'

341.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Do not say: What Allah willed and what so-and-so willed. Say: What Allah willed, then what so-and-so willed.'
341.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah berkata: Apa yang Allah kehendaki dan apa yang dikehendaki si fulan. Katakanlah: Apa yang Allah kehendaki, kemudian apa yang dikehendaki si fulan.'

342.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'What are tents after tents that were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ at Badr! They are repelled from in a way that is not repelled from the people of these tents. No people intend them harm except that something comes to them to distract them from them.'
342.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Apalah artinya tenda-tenda setelah tenda-tenda yang bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di Badar! Mereka dilindungi dengan cara yang tidak dilindungi kepada penghuni tenda-tenda ini. Tidak ada kaum yang bermaksud jahat kepada mereka kecuali sesuatu datang kepada mereka untuk menyibukkan mereka darinya.'

343.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed the Fear Prayer at Dhu Qarad, a land of Banu Sulaym. The people formed two rows behind him — one row facing the enemy and one behind him. He prayed one rak'ah with the row closest to him, then those moved to the positions of the others, and the others to their positions, and he prayed again...
343.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melaksanakan Shalat Khauf di Dzu Qarad, sebuah wilayah milik Banu Sulaym. Orang-orang membentuk dua baris di belakangnya — satu baris menghadap musuh dan satu di belakangnya. Beliau shalat satu rakaat bersama baris yang terdekat dengannya, kemudian mereka berpindah ke posisi orang-orang lain, dan yang lain ke posisi mereka, lalu beliau shalat lagi...

344.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited wearing silk and brocade, and using vessels of gold and silver, and said: 'These are for them in this world and for us in the Hereafter.'
344.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang mengenakan sutra dan brokat, dan menggunakan bejana emas dan perak, dan bersabda: 'Ini adalah untuk mereka di dunia ini dan untuk kita di akhirat.'

345.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited announcing deaths.
345.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang mengumumkan kematian.

346.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when he went to his bed, would say: 'In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.' And when he woke up he would say: 'Praise be to Allah who has given us life after causing us to die, and to Him is the resurrection.'
346.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, ketika pergi ke tempat tidurnya, berdoa: 'Dengan nama-Mu ya Allah, aku mati dan aku hidup.' Dan ketika bangun beliau berdoa: 'Segala puji bagi Allah yang telah menghidupkan kami setelah mematikan kami, dan kepada-Nyalah kebangkitan.'

347.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Sayyid and the Aqib came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, send your trustworthy one with us.' He said: 'I will send with you a truly trustworthy one.' The people eagerly awaited who it would be, and he sent Abu Ubayda ibn al-Jarrah.
347.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa al-Sayyid dan al-Aqib datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, utuslah orang kepercayaanmu bersama kami.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku akan mengutus bersama kalian orang yang benar-benar dipercaya.' Orang-orang bersemangat menantikan siapa itu, dan beliau mengutus Abu Ubaidah ibn al-Jarrah.

348.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that Jibril (peace be upon him) met the Prophet ﷺ at the stones of al-Mira' and said: 'Your nation reads the Quran in seven dialects. Whoever reads it in one dialect, let him read as he learned and not go back on it.' The narrator's father added: 'Among your nation are the weak, so...'
348.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Jibril (alayhissalam) bertemu Nabi ﷺ di batu-batu al-Mira' dan berkata: 'Umatmu membaca Al-Quran dalam tujuh dialek. Barangsiapa membacanya dalam satu dialek, hendaklah dia membaca sebagaimana yang dia pelajari dan tidak kembali darinya.' Ayah perawi menambahkan: 'Di antara umatmu ada yang lemah, maka...'

349.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ stood among us in a standing and did not leave out anything that would happen before the Hour except that he mentioned it in that standing. Whoever memorized it memorized it, and whoever forgot it forgot it. I see things that I had been made to forget and I recognize them just as a man recognizes the face of a man who had been absent from him and then he sees him.'
349.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ berdiri di antara kami dalam suatu kesempatan dan tidak melewatkan sesuatu pun yang akan terjadi sebelum Kiamat kecuali beliau menyebutnya dalam kesempatan itu. Siapa yang menghafalnya menghafalnya, dan siapa yang melupakannya melupakannya. Aku melihat hal-hal yang sempat aku lupakan dan aku mengenalinya seperti seorang laki-laki mengenali wajah orang yang pernah absen darinya kemudian dia melihatnya.'

350.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfa ibn al-Yaman (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about everything, even about smoothing pebbles in prayer. He said: Once — or leave it.'
350.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang segala hal, bahkan tentang meratakan batu kerikil dalam shalat. Beliau bersabda: Sekali — atau tinggalkan.'
